entities.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
key_features: Released March 2025, replaced experimental Swarm framework
Tight integration with OpenAI Responses API and function calling

entities.name: Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0
key_features: Unified AutoGen + Semantic Kernel into single production SDK
MCP server support for standardized tool integration

entities.name: Pydantic AI
key_features: Type-safe agent framework built on Pydantic
Best for teams wanting minimal framework lock-in

entities.name: Smolagents
key_features: Lightweight agent framework from Hugging Face
Code-based agent actions (not just tool calls)

entities.name: Temporal Agent Workflow
key_features: Stateful workflow engine for AI agents
Scales to millions of concurrent workflows

entities.name: OpenAI Responses API SDK
key_features: New Responses API for agent interactions
Built-in tool use and function calling

entities.name: Scrapling
entities.description: Adaptive web scraping framework with anti-bot bypass, smart element tracking, and AI agent integration

entities.name: Vercel AI SDK v2
